source_meta.source_document: GLOBAL AP IMPL and Patient Information Leaflet for Shoulder Joint Replacement

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official DePuy Synthes GLOBAL AP instrument inventory supports a dedicated shoulder arthroplasty instrumentation workflow applicable to the Global Advantage / Delta XTEND construct.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official GLOBAL AP implant inventory documents the humeral stem family.
Official GLOBAL AP implant inventory documents humeral head options.
The Delta XTEND reverse shoulder platform includes glenosphere components as part of the reverse construct.
The Delta XTEND reverse shoulder platform includes glenoid baseplate fixation components.

PRODUCTS.Product Notes: Catalog code explicitly listed in the official GLOBAL AP implant inventory PDF.

row.system_notes: Combined anatomic/reverse shoulder construct anchored to official DePuy GLOBAL AP inventory documents and the patient-information leaflet listing Global Advantage and Delta Xtend.
